name: evermind-scraper
description: Durable article-to-Obsidian pipeline with multi-tier fallback ladder

scripts.package: rm -rf dist && tsc && npx pkg . --targets node18-macos --public --no-bytecode --output bin/evermind && npx pkg . --targets node18-linux-arm64 --public --no-bytecode --output bin/evermind-linux-arm64
scripts.test: rm -rf dist && tsc && mkdir -p dist/tests/fixtures && cp tests/fixtures/*.html dist/tests/fixtures/ && node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js
